name: Mobile Web IDE
description: A fully functioning mobile-first web IDE with CodeMirror editing, code completion, debugging, integrated terminal, file explorer, project management, Git + GitHub integration, Google Drive integration, real-time collaboration, customizable themes, multi-language support, and a JavaScript extensions API.
majorCapabilities: Code editor with syntax highlighting, autocompletion, linting, search
Full Git integration (clone, commit, push, pull, branches, diff)
GitHub integration (sign in, repos, create, publish)
In-browser file system with project management
Debugger with breakpoints and sandboxed run
Advanced code search, symbol navigation, fuzzy file open
